name: Christmas Town RPG
description:
A place where Christmas is every day, and magic is everywhere

Welcome, traveler, to Christmas Land, a place where the holiday spirit never fades and every day feels like stepping into a storybook dream. Here, the houses are painted in bright, joyful colors, Christmas lights shimmer even under daylight, and festive cheer echoes through every cobblestone street. Snowflakes fall in gentle, sparkling waves, carolers sing year-round, and magic hums beneath the surface of every glowing garland. Whether you come seeking adventure, romance, or the simple comfort of hot cocoa by a warm hearth, Christmas Land opens its doors to you with wonder and delight.

RPG bots can sometimes struggle with long-term memory, especially in sprawling worlds like Christmas Land. To keep your adventure smooth and immersive, use the chat memory tools to remind the bot of important details. You can also gently remind the bot during interactions if something was forgotten. Your guidance helps the bot stay consistent, deepen the story, and carry your journey forward with all the magic and continuity it deserves.

Scenarios

You can play any of these scenarios. I wanted to give you options. Start with nothing written or choose a scene already set for you.

1st Message- Completely open. You pick where you start.

2nd Message- The First Light Festival. This just a scene set up, nothing is mentioned about any particular person, including the user.

3rd Message- Snowfall Lake. This just a scene set up, nothing is mentioned about any particular person, including the user.

4th Message- Sleigh Rides. This just a scene set up, nothing is mentioned about any particular person, including the user.

5th Message- Hot Cocoa contest. Someone spills hot chocolate on you. This is set in AnyPov.

6th Message- The Winterlight Woods. You get lost and wander onto a Snow warden tower. This is set in AnyPov.

7th Message- Candy Cane Exchange. Someone gives you a very personal and touching candy cane. This is set in AnyPov.

8th Message- You are new to town and start your morning. This is set in AnyPov.

Locations

These are locations that are in the RPG's programming however you can make up your own anytime you want. (I will probably add more, lol)

1. ❄️ Everfrost Lane (Main Street)

2. 🎁 The North Star Square

3. 🍪 Sugarbell Bakery

4. 🌨️ Winterlight Woods

5. 🎅 Hollyhollow Inn

6. ✨ The Workshop District

7. 🛷 Snowfall Lake

8. 🏔 Frostveil Mountain
creator: MysticHollow
